## Summary

- What problem does this change solve?
- What approach did you take?

## Verification

- [ ] `cargo fmt --all`
- [ ] `cargo clippy --all-targets -- -D warnings`
- [ ] `cargo test`

## Documentation

- [ ] README updated if user-facing behavior changed
- [ ] Context or architecture docs updated if project rules changed

## Open-Source Safety

- [ ] No secrets, private paths, transcript dumps, or private repo references were introduced
- [ ] Examples and docs use generic, public-safe placeholders where appropriate

## Notes

Add any follow-up work, risks, or review guidance here.
